Common.name: Common
Common.description: Universal campus discourse and administrative documentation.[cite: 7]

Dwarvish.name: Dwarvish
Dwarvish.description: Dwarves; technical, featuring hard consonants and guttural phonetics.[cite: 7]

Elvish.name: Elvish
Elvish.description: Elves; fluid, melodic intonations with intricate grammatical structures.[cite: 7]

Halfling.name: Halfling
Halfling.description: Halflings; primarily an oral tradition with limited formal literature.[cite: 7]

Gnomish.name: Gnomish
Gnomish.description: Gnomes; the preferred tongue for technical and alchemical treatises.[cite: 7]

Draconic.name: Draconic
Draconic.description: Dragons and Dragonborn; ancient, harsh, and sibilant.[cite: 7]

Orc.name: Orc
Orc.description: Orcs; grating phonetics; traditionally utilizes the Dwarvish script.[cite: 7]

Infernal.name: Infernal
Infernal.description: Tieflings and extraplanar entities; precise and legalistic.[cite: 7]
